name: Kunal Shah
notes: Highest-value connector for Fintech deals. Always looking for "value-dense" products.

name: Utsav Somani
notes: Most active pre-seed investor in India. iSeed is the best warm intro channel for early stage.

name: Nikhil Kamath
notes: Contrarian thinker. Invest alongside for Fintech. Very selective — data-driven pitches only.

name: Anupam Mittal
notes: Lead shark on Shark Tank India. High-conviction consumer/D2C investor. Always accessible via LinkedIn.

notes: Best investor for D2C and consumer brand plays. Shark Tank Season 3 most active investor.

notes: Best contact for women-focused consumer and beauty plays.

name: Mukesh Bansal
notes: CRITICAL UPDATE Jul 8 2026: Mukesh Bansal is now co-founding Fermi.ai (AI-first STEM EdTech, launched Jan 2026, Bengaluru team), tracked as c052. When reaching out to him as an angel, note he is actively building — use reciprocity angle around India EdTech market intelligence. Consumer health + fitness thesis strong, and now also AI/EdTech via Fermi.ai.
